message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'clear_delayed_call' sets signal field 'delayed_call.fn', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=delayed_call;field=fn;offset=0] [oracle:assert=delayed_call.fn stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets fn without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
